revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|EstcatCountry}} == Usage == In September 2019, this template's syntax was changed to a new format which doesn't need year parameters. If used, they will now trigger an error message, and the page will be categorised in [[: Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]] (population: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates}}) {{Purge page|''Purge page to update total''}} ===Syntax === '''{{EstcatCountry|''''' country [ | sort key ]''}} ;Examples :'''{{EstcatCountry|the United States|United States}}''' :'''{{EstcatCountry|Belgium}}''' ====Change of country name==== From 2015 to January 2022, this template took an optional parameter for a new name of the country. That parameter is now obsolete, as the template makes use of category redirects instead. If the default parent category "Establishments in 'X' by year" is a category redirect page, the template will resolve the category redirect, i.e. it will use the target page with the new name instead. Similarly, it will resolve a redirect on the decade parent. ; Examples : The name [[Myanmar]] is used on all categories for 1989 onwards, and for any periods ending in or after that year, e.g. 1980s and 20th century. For categories up to 1988, use the old name, i.e. '''{{EstcatCountry|Burma}}''' On [[:Category:1988 establishments in Burma]], the template generates parent categories [[:Category:1980s establishments in Myanmar]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]], because both [[:Category:1980s establishments in Burma]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Burma by year]] are category redirects to the corresponding names using Myanmar. On [[:Category:1906 establishments in Burma]], the parent categories will be [[:Category:1900s establishments in Burma]], which is not redirected, but [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]]. ====Suppressing parent category for decade==== The template normally adds the page into a parent for the decade. In cases where that decade category does not exist, and it would not be useful to create it because of the short duration or small number of categories for this country, append |decadeparent=no ====Disambiguation==== If the country name used in the category title is ambiguous, use the optional named '''dab''' parameter to link to the mainspace article about the country. ; Example : '''{{estcatCountry|Malaya|dab=Malayan Union}}''' == Error checking == Error messages are display if this template is used in a which is not named "Category:YYYY establishments in Foo", and are categorized in [[:Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]]. == See also == * [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] * [[Template:EstcatCountryCentury]] * [[Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium]] * [[Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium]] * [[Template:Estcatsubcountry]] (for subdivisions of countries, like states, provinces, departments; or regions of continents) * [[Template:EstcatUSstate]] * [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|EstcatCountry}} == Usage == In September 2019, this template's syntax was changed to a new format which doesn't need year parameters. If used, they will now trigger an error message, and the page will be categorised in [[: Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]] (population: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates}}) {{Purge page|''Purge page to update total''}} ===Syntax === '''{{EstcatCountry|''''' country [ | sort key ]''}} ;Examples :'''{{EstcatCountry|the United States|United States}}''' :'''{{EstcatCountry|Belgium}}''' ====Change of country name==== From 2015 to January 2022, this template took an optional parameter for a new name of the country. That parameter is now obsolete, as the template makes use of category redirects instead. If the default parent category "Establishments in 'X' by year" is a category redirect page, the template will resolve the category redirect, i.e. it will use the target page with the new name instead. Similarly, it will resolve a redirect on the decade parent. ; Examples : The name [[Myanmar]] is used on all categories for 1989 onwards, and for any periods ending in or after that year, e.g. 1980s and 20th century. For categories up to 1988, use the old name, i.e. '''{{EstcatCountry|Burma}}''' On [[:Category:1988 establishments in Burma]], the template generates parent categories [[:Category:1980s establishments in Myanmar]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]], because both [[:Category:1980s establishments in Burma]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Burma by year]] are category redirects to the corresponding names using Myanmar. On [[:Category:1906 establishments in Burma]], the parent categories will be [[:Category:1900s establishments in Burma]], which is not redirected, but [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]]. ====Suppressing parent category for decade==== The template normally adds the page into a parent for the decade. In cases where that decade category does not exist, and it would not be useful to create it because of the short duration or small number of categories for this country, append |decadeparent=no ====Disambiguation==== If the country name used in the category title is ambiguous, use the optional named '''dab''' parameter to link to the mainspace article about the country. ; Example : '''{{estcatCountry|Malaya|dab=Malayan Union}}''' == Error checking == Error messages are display if this template is used in a which is not named "Category:YYYY establishments in Foo", and are categorized in [[:Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]]. == See also == * [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] * [[Template:EstcatCountryCentury]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium]] * [[Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium]] * [[Template:Estcatsubcountry]] (for subdivisions of countries, like states, provinces, departments; or regions of continents) * [[Template:EstcatUSstate]] * [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|EstcatCountry}} == Usage == In September 2019, this template's syntax was changed to a new format which doesn't need year parameters. If used, they will now trigger an error message, and the page will be categorised in [[: Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]] (population: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates}}) {{Purge page|''Purge page to update total''}} ===Syntax === '''{{EstcatCountry|''''' country [ | sort key ]''}} ;Examples :'''{{EstcatCountry|the United States|United States}}''' :'''{{EstcatCountry|Belgium}}''' ====Change of country name==== From 2015 to January 2022, this template took an optional parameter for a new name of the country. That parameter is now obsolete, as the template makes use of category redirects instead. If the default parent category "Establishments in 'X' by year" is a category redirect page, the template will resolve the category redirect, i.e. it will use the target page with the new name instead. Similarly, it will resolve a redirect on the decade parent. ; Examples : The name [[Myanmar]] is used on all categories for 1989 onwards, and for any periods ending in or after that year, e.g. 1980s and 20th century. For categories up to 1988, use the old name, i.e. '''{{EstcatCountry|Burma}}''' On [[:Category:1988 establishments in Burma]], the template generates parent categories [[:Category:1980s establishments in Myanmar]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]], because both [[:Category:1980s establishments in Burma]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Burma by year]] are category redirects to the corresponding names using Myanmar. On [[:Category:1906 establishments in Burma]], the parent categories will be [[:Category:1900s establishments in Burma]], which is not redirected, but [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]]. ====Suppressing parent category for decade==== The template normally adds the page into a parent for the decade. In cases where that decade category does not exist, and it would not be useful to create it because of the short duration or small number of categories for this country, append |decadeparent=no ====Disambiguation==== If the country name used in the category title is ambiguous, use the optional named '''dab''' parameter to link to the mainspace article about the country. ; Example : '''{{estcatCountry|Malaya|dab=Malayan Union}}''' == Error checking == Error messages are display if this template is used in a which is not named "Category:YYYY establishments in Foo", and are categorized in [[:Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]]. == See also == * [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] * [[Template:EstcatCountryCentury]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium]] * [[Template:Estcatsubcountry]] (for subdivisions of countries, like states, provinces, departments; or regions of continents) * [[Template:EstcatUSstate]] * [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|EstcatCountry}} == Usage == In September 2019, this template's syntax was changed to a new format which doesn't need year parameters. If used, they will now trigger an error message, and the page will be categorised in [[: Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]] (population: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates}}) {{Purge page|''Purge page to update total''}} ===Syntax === '''{{EstcatCountry|''''' country [ | sort key ]''}} ;Examples :'''{{EstcatCountry|the United States|United States}}''' :'''{{EstcatCountry|Belgium}}''' ====Change of country name==== From 2015 to January 2022, this template took an optional parameter for a new name of the country. That parameter is now obsolete, as the template makes use of category redirects instead. If the default parent category "Establishments in 'X' by year" is a category redirect page, the template will resolve the category redirect, i.e. it will use the target page with the new name instead. Similarly, it will resolve a redirect on the decade parent. ; Examples : The name [[Myanmar]] is used on all categories for 1989 onwards, and for any periods ending in or after that year, e.g. 1980s and 20th century. For categories up to 1988, use the old name, i.e. '''{{EstcatCountry|Burma}}''' On [[:Category:1988 establishments in Burma]], the template generates parent categories [[:Category:1980s establishments in Myanmar]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]], because both [[:Category:1980s establishments in Burma]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Burma by year]] are category redirects to the corresponding names using Myanmar. On [[:Category:1906 establishments in Burma]], the parent categories will be [[:Category:1900s establishments in Burma]], which is not redirected, but [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]]. ====Suppressing parent category for decade==== The template normally adds the page into a parent for the decade. In cases where that decade category does not exist, and it would not be useful to create it because of the short duration or small number of categories for this country, append |decadeparent=no ====Disambiguation==== If the country name used in the category title is ambiguous, use the optional named '''dab''' parameter to link to the mainspace article about the country. ; Example : '''{{estcatCountry|Malaya|dab=Malayan Union}}''' == Error checking == Error messages are display if this template is used in a which is not named "Category:YYYY establishments in Foo", and are categorized in [[:Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]]. == See also == * [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] * [[Template:EstcatCountryCentury]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium]] * [[Template:Estcatsubcountry]] (for subdivisions of countries, like states, provinces, departments; or regions of continents) * [[:en:Template:EstcatUSstate|Template:EstcatUSstate]] * [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] }}

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|EstcatCountry}} == Usage == In September 2019, this template's syntax was changed to a new format which doesn't need year parameters. If used, they will now trigger an error message, and the page will be categorised in [[: Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]] (population: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates}}) {{Purge page|''Purge page to update total''}} ===Syntax === '''{{EstcatCountry|''''' country [ | sort key ]''}} ;Examples :'''{{EstcatCountry|the United States|United States}}''' :'''{{EstcatCountry|Belgium}}''' ====Change of country name==== From 2015 to January 2022, this template took an optional parameter for a new name of the country. That parameter is now obsolete, as the template makes use of category redirects instead. If the default parent category "Establishments in 'X' by year" is a category redirect page, the template will resolve the category redirect, i.e. it will use the target page with the new name instead. Similarly, it will resolve a redirect on the decade parent. ; Examples : The name [[Myanmar]] is used on all categories for 1989 onwards, and for any periods ending in or after that year, e.g. 1980s and 20th century. For categories up to 1988, use the old name, i.e. '''{{EstcatCountry|Burma}}''' On [[:Category:1988 establishments in Burma]], the template generates parent categories [[:Category:1980s establishments in Myanmar]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]], because both [[:Category:1980s establishments in Burma]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Burma by year]] are category redirects to the corresponding names using Myanmar. On [[:Category:1906 establishments in Burma]], the parent categories will be [[:Category:1900s establishments in Burma]], which is not redirected, but [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]]. ====Suppressing parent category for decade==== The template normally adds the page into a parent for the decade. In cases where that decade category does not exist, and it would not be useful to create it because of the short duration or small number of categories for this country, append |decadeparent=no ====Disambiguation==== If the country name used in the category title is ambiguous, use the optional named '''dab''' parameter to link to the mainspace article about the country. ; Example : '''{{estcatCountry|Malaya|dab=Malayan Union}}''' == Error checking == Error messages are display if this template is used in a which is not named "Category:YYYY establishments in Foo", and are categorized in [[:Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]]. == See also == * [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] * [[Template:EstcatCountryCentury]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:Estcatsubcountry|Template:Estcatsubcountry]] (for subdivisions of countries, like states, provinces, departments; or regions of continents) * [[:en:Template:EstcatUSstate|Template:EstcatUSstate]] * [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|EstcatCountry}} == Usage == In September 2019, this template's syntax was changed to a new format which doesn't need year parameters. If used, they will now trigger an error message, and the page will be categorised in [[: Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]] (population: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates}}) {{Purge page|''Purge page to update total''}} ===Syntax === '''{{EstcatCountry|''''' country [ | sort key ]''}} ;Examples :'''{{EstcatCountry|the United States|United States}}''' :'''{{EstcatCountry|Belgium}}''' ====Change of country name==== From 2015 to January 2022, this template took an optional parameter for a new name of the country. That parameter is now obsolete, as the template makes use of category redirects instead. If the default parent category "Establishments in 'X' by year" is a category redirect page, the template will resolve the category redirect, i.e. it will use the target page with the new name instead. Similarly, it will resolve a redirect on the decade parent. ; Examples : The name [[:en:Myanmar|Myanmar]] is used on all categories for 1989 onwards, and for any periods ending in or after that year, e.g. 1980s and 20th century. For categories up to 1988, use the old name, i.e. '''{{EstcatCountry|Burma}}''' On [[:Category:1988 establishments in Burma]], the template generates parent categories [[:Category:1980s establishments in Myanmar]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]], because both [[:Category:1980s establishments in Burma]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Burma by year]] are category redirects to the corresponding names using Myanmar. On [[:Category:1906 establishments in Burma]], the parent categories will be [[:Category:1900s establishments in Burma]], which is not redirected, but [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]]. ====Suppressing parent category for decade==== The template normally adds the page into a parent for the decade. In cases where that decade category does not exist, and it would not be useful to create it because of the short duration or small number of categories for this country, append |decadeparent=no ====Disambiguation==== If the country name used in the category title is ambiguous, use the optional named '''dab''' parameter to link to the mainspace article about the country. ; Example : '''{{estcatCountry|Malaya|dab=Malayan Union}}''' == Error checking == Error messages are display if this template is used in a which is not named "Category:YYYY establishments in Foo", and are categorized in [[:Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]]. == See also == * [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] * [[Template:EstcatCountryCentury]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:Estcatsubcountry|Template:Estcatsubcountry]] (for subdivisions of countries, like states, provinces, departments; or regions of continents) * [[:en:Template:EstcatUSstate|Template:EstcatUSstate]] * [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|EstcatCountry}} == Usage == In September 2019, this template's syntax was changed to a new format which doesn't need year parameters. If used, they will now trigger an error message, and the page will be categorised in [[: Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]] (population: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates}}) {{Purge page|''Purge page to update total''}} ===Syntax === '''{{EstcatCountry|''''' country [ | sort key ]''}} ;Examples :'''{{EstcatCountry|the United States|United States}}''' :'''{{EstcatCountry|Belgium}}''' ====Change of country name==== From 2015 to January 2022, this template took an optional parameter for a new name of the country. That parameter is now obsolete, as the template makes use of category redirects instead. If the default parent category "Establishments in 'X' by year" is a category redirect page, the template will resolve the category redirect, i.e. it will use the target page with the new name instead. Similarly, it will resolve a redirect on the decade parent. ; Examples : The name [[:en:Myanmar|Myanmar]] is used on all categories for 1989 onwards, and for any periods ending in or after that year, e.g. 1980s and 20th century. For categories up to 1988, use the old name, i.e. '''{{EstcatCountry|Burma}}''' On [[:Category:1988 establishments in Burma]], the template generates parent categories [[:Category:1980s establishments in Myanmar]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]], because both [[:Category:1980s establishments in Burma]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Burma by year]] are category redirects to the corresponding names using Myanmar. On [[:Category:1906 establishments in Burma]], the parent categories will be [[:Category:1900s establishments in Burma]], which is not redirected, but [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]]. ====Suppressing parent category for decade==== The template normally adds the page into a parent for the decade. In cases where that decade category does not exist, and it would not be useful to create it because of the short duration or small number of categories for this country, append |decadeparent=no ====Disambiguation==== If the country name used in the category title is ambiguous, use the optional named '''dab''' parameter to link to the mainspace article about the country. ; Example : '''{{estcatCountry|Malaya|dab=Malayan Union}}''' == Error checking == Error messages are display if this template is used in a which is not named "Category:YYYY establishments in Foo", and are categorized in [[:Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]]. == See also == * [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] * [[Template:EstcatCountryCentury]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:Estcatsubcountry|Template:Estcatsubcountry]] (for subdivisions of countries, like states, provinces, departments; or regions of continents) * [[:en:Template:EstcatUSstate|Template:EstcatUSstate]] * [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|EstcatCountry}} == Usage == In September 2019, this template's syntax was changed to a new format which doesn't need year parameters. If used, they will now trigger an error message, and the page will be categorised in [[: Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]] (population: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates}}) {{Purge page|''Purge page to update total''}} ===Syntax === '''{{EstcatCountry|''''' country [ | sort key ]''}} ;Examples :'''{{EstcatCountry|the United States|United States}}''' :'''{{EstcatCountry|Belgium}}''' ====Change of country name==== From 2015 to January 2022, this template took an optional parameter for a new name of the country. That parameter is now obsolete, as the template makes use of category redirects instead. If the default parent category "Establishments in 'X' by year" is a category redirect page, the template will resolve the category redirect, i.e. it will use the target page with the new name instead. Similarly, it will resolve a redirect on the decade parent. ; Examples : The name [[:en:Myanmar|Myanmar]] is used on all categories for 1989 onwards, and for any periods ending in or after that year, e.g. 1980s and 20th century. For categories up to 1988, use the old name, i.e. '''{{EstcatCountry|Burma}}''' On [[:Category:1988 establishments in Burma]], the template generates parent categories [[:Category:1980s establishments in Myanmar]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]], because both [[:Category:1980s establishments in Burma]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Burma by year]] are category redirects to the corresponding names using Myanmar. On [[:Category:1906 establishments in Burma]], the parent categories will be [[:Category:1900s establishments in Burma]], which is not redirected, but [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]]. ====Suppressing parent category for decade==== The template normally adds the page into a parent for the decade. In cases where that decade category does not exist, and it would not be useful to create it because of the short duration or small number of categories for this country, append |decadeparent=no ====Disambiguation==== If the country name used in the category title is ambiguous, use the optional named '''dab''' parameter to link to the mainspace article about the country. ; Example : '''{{estcatCountry|Malaya|dab=Malayan Union}}''' == Error checking == Error messages are display if this template is used in a which is not named "Category:YYYY establishments in Foo", and are categorized in [[:Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]]. == See also == * [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] * [[Template:EstcatCountryCentury]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:Estcatsubcountry|Template:Estcatsubcountry]] (for subdivisions of countries, like states, provinces, departments; or regions of continents) * [[:en:Template:EstcatUSstate|Template:EstcatUSstate]] * [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|EstcatCountry}} == Usage == In September 2019, this template's syntax was changed to a new format which doesn't need year parameters. If used, they will now trigger an error message, and the page will be categorised in [[: Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]] (population: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates}}) {{Purge page|''Purge page to update total''}} ===Syntax === '''{{EstcatCountry|''''' country [ | sort key ]''}} ;Examples :'''{{EstcatCountry|the United States|United States}}''' :'''{{EstcatCountry|Belgium}}''' ====Change of country name==== From 2015 to January 2022, this template took an optional parameter for a new name of the country. That parameter is now obsolete, as the template makes use of category redirects instead. If the default parent category "Establishments in 'X' by year" is a category redirect page, the template will resolve the category redirect, i.e. it will use the target page with the new name instead. Similarly, it will resolve a redirect on the decade parent. ; Examples : The name [[:en:Myanmar|Myanmar]] is used on all categories for 1989 onwards, and for any periods ending in or after that year, e.g. 1980s and 20th century. For categories up to 1988, use the old name, i.e. '''{{EstcatCountry|Burma}}''' On [[:Category:1988 establishments in Burma]], the template generates parent categories [[:Category:1980s establishments in Myanmar]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]], because both [[:Category:1980s establishments in Burma]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Burma by year]] are category redirects to the corresponding names using Myanmar. On [[:Category:1906 establishments in Burma]], the parent categories will be [[:Category:1900s establishments in Burma]], which is not redirected, but [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]]. ====Suppressing parent category for decade==== The template normally adds the page into a parent for the decade. In cases where that decade category does not exist, and it would not be useful to create it because of the short duration or small number of categories for this country, append |decadeparent=no ====Disambiguation==== If the country name used in the category title is ambiguous, use the optional named '''dab''' parameter to link to the mainspace article about the country. ; Example : '''{{estcatCountry|Malaya|dab=Malayan Union}}''' == Error checking == Error messages are display if this template is used in a which is not named "Category:YYYY establishments in Foo", and are categorized in [[:Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]]. == See also == * [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] * [[Template:EstcatCountryCentury]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:Estcatsubcountry|Template:Estcatsubcountry]] (for subdivisions of countries, like states, provinces, departments; or regions of continents) * [[:en:Template:EstcatUSstate|Template:EstcatUSstate]] * [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|EstcatCountry}} == Usage == In September 2019, this template's syntax was changed to a new format which doesn't need year parameters. If used, they will now trigger an error message, and the page will be categorised in [[: Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]] (population: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates}}) {{Purge page|''Purge page to update total''}} ===Syntax === '''{{EstcatCountry|''''' country [ | sort key ]''}} ;Examples :'''{{EstcatCountry|the United States|United States}}''' :'''{{EstcatCountry|Belgium}}''' ====Change of country name==== From 2015 to January 2022, this template took an optional parameter for a new name of the country. That parameter is now obsolete, as the template makes use of category redirects instead. If the default parent category "Establishments in 'X' by year" is a category redirect page, the template will resolve the category redirect, i.e. it will use the target page with the new name instead. Similarly, it will resolve a redirect on the decade parent. ; Examples : The name [[:en:Myanmar|Myanmar]] is used on all categories for 1989 onwards, and for any periods ending in or after that year, e.g. 1980s and 20th century. For categories up to 1988, use the old name, i.e. '''{{EstcatCountry|Burma}}''' On [[:Category:1988 establishments in Burma]], the template generates parent categories [[:Category:1980s establishments in Myanmar]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]], because both [[:Category:1980s establishments in Burma]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Burma by year]] are category redirects to the corresponding names using Myanmar. On [[:Category:1906 establishments in Burma]], the parent categories will be [[:Category:1900s establishments in Burma]], which is not redirected, but [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]]. ====Suppressing parent category for decade==== The template normally adds the page into a parent for the decade. In cases where that decade category does not exist, and it would not be useful to create it because of the short duration or small number of categories for this country, append |decadeparent=no ====Disambiguation==== If the country name used in the category title is ambiguous, use the optional named '''dab''' parameter to link to the mainspace article about the country. ; Example : '''{{estcatCountry|Malaya|dab=Malayan Union}}''' == Error checking == Error messages are display if this template is used in a which is not named "Category:YYYY establishments in Foo", and are categorized in [[:Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]]. == See also == * [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] * [[Template:EstcatCountryCentury]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:Estcatsubcountry|Template:Estcatsubcountry]] (for subdivisions of countries, like states, provinces, departments; or regions of continents) * [[:en:Template:EstcatUSstate|Template:EstcatUSstate]] * [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Establishment_category_in_country%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|EstcatCountry}} == Usage == In September 2019, this template's syntax was changed to a new format which doesn't need year parameters. If used, they will now trigger an error message, and the page will be categorised in [[: Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]] (population: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates}}) {{Purge page|''Purge page to update total''}} ===Syntax === '''{{EstcatCountry|''''' country [ | sort key ]''}} ;Examples :'''{{EstcatCountry|the United States|United States}}''' :'''{{EstcatCountry|Belgium}}''' ====Change of country name==== From 2015 to January 2022, this template took an optional parameter for a new name of the country. That parameter is now obsolete, as the template makes use of category redirects instead. If the default parent category "Establishments in 'X' by year" is a category redirect page, the template will resolve the category redirect, i.e. it will use the target page with the new name instead. Similarly, it will resolve a redirect on the decade parent. ; Examples : The name [[:en:Myanmar|Myanmar]] is used on all categories for 1989 onwards, and for any periods ending in or after that year, e.g. 1980s and 20th century. For categories up to 1988, use the old name, i.e. '''{{EstcatCountry|Burma}}''' On [[:Category:1988 establishments in Burma]], the template generates parent categories [[:Category:1980s establishments in Myanmar]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]], because both [[:Category:1980s establishments in Burma]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Burma by year]] are category redirects to the corresponding names using Myanmar. On [[:Category:1906 establishments in Burma]], the parent categories will be [[:Category:1900s establishments in Burma]], which is not redirected, but [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]]. ====Suppressing parent category for decade==== The template normally adds the page into a parent for the decade. In cases where that decade category does not exist, and it would not be useful to create it because of the short duration or small number of categories for this country, append |decadeparent=no ====Disambiguation==== If the country name used in the category title is ambiguous, use the optional named '''dab''' parameter to link to the mainspace article about the country. ; Example : '''{{estcatCountry|Malaya|dab=Malayan Union}}''' == Error checking == Error messages are display if this template is used in a which is not named "Category:YYYY establishments in Foo", and are categorized in [[:Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]]. == See also == * [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] * [[Template:EstcatCountryCentury]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:Estcatsubcountry|Template:Estcatsubcountry]] (for subdivisions of countries, like states, provinces, departments; or regions of continents) * [[:en:Template:EstcatUSstate|Template:EstcatUSstate]] * [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|EstcatCountry}} == Usage == In September 2019, this template's syntax was changed to a new format which doesn't need year parameters. If used, they will now trigger an error message, and the page will be categorised in [[: Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]] (population: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates}}) {{Purge page|''Purge page to update total''}} ===Syntax === '''{{EstcatCountry|''''' country [ | sort key ]''}} ;Examples :'''{{EstcatCountry|the United States|United States}}''' :'''{{EstcatCountry|Belgium}}''' ====Change of country name==== From 2015 to January 2022, this template took an optional parameter for a new name of the country. That parameter is now obsolete, as the template makes use of category redirects instead. If the default parent category "Establishments in 'X' by year" is a category redirect page, the template will resolve the category redirect, i.e. it will use the target page with the new name instead. Similarly, it will resolve a redirect on the decade parent. ; Examples : The name [[:en:Myanmar|Myanmar]] is used on all categories for 1989 onwards, and for any periods ending in or after that year, e.g. 1980s and 20th century. For categories up to 1988, use the old name, i.e. '''{{EstcatCountry|Burma}}''' On [[:Category:1988 establishments in Burma]], the template generates parent categories [[:Category:1980s establishments in Myanmar]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]], because both [[:Category:1980s establishments in Burma]] and [[:Category:Establishments in Burma by year]] are category redirects to the corresponding names using Myanmar. On [[:Category:1906 establishments in Burma]], the parent categories will be [[:Category:1900s establishments in Burma]], which is not redirected, but [[:Category:Establishments in Myanmar by year]]. ====Suppressing parent category for decade==== The template normally adds the page into a parent for the decade. In cases where that decade category does not exist, and it would not be useful to create it because of the short duration or small number of categories for this country, append |decadeparent=no ====Disambiguation==== If the country name used in the category title is ambiguous, use the optional named '''dab''' parameter to link to the mainspace article about the country. ; Example : '''{{estcatCountry|Malaya|dab=Malayan Union}}''' == Error checking == Error messages are display if this template is used in a which is not named "Category:YYYY establishments in Foo", and are categorized in [[:Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates]]. == See also == * [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] * [[Template:EstcatCountryCentury]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry2ndMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium|Template:EstcatCountry3rdMillennium]] * [[:en:Template:Estcatsubcountry|Template:Estcatsubcountry]] (for subdivisions of countries, like states, provinces, departments; or regions of continents) * [[:en:Template:EstcatUSstate|Template:EstcatUSstate]] * [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Establishments-by-year templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
